title: centaurea codruensis
intro: Centaurea codruensis, also known as Codru knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea codruensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments such as infections and ulcers. Centaurea codruensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
